name: IEMR Resources Inc.
summary: IEMR Resources Inc., a mineral exploration company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. The company holds a 100% interest in the Pine Tree copper-molybdenum property comprising 61 mineral lode claims covering an area of approximately 1320 acres located in the Pilot Mountains in Mina, Nevada. The company was formerly known as Trans National Minerals Inc. and changed its name to IEMR Resources Inc. in September 2010. IEMR Resources Inc. was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
